title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at V-Mart Retail

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at V-Mart Retail
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with V-Mart Retail! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Nashik team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About V-Mart Retail:
V-Mart Retail is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with V-Mart Retail!
